title: Check attribution completeness
description: Verify the committed NOTICE/THIRD-PARTY file covers every attribution-requiring component in the current lockfile.
body: Use when validating that a release satisfies notice duties. Procedure: regenerate the attribution file from the current lockfile, diff it against the committed NOTICE/THIRD-PARTY file, and list every component present in the lockfile but missing from the notice, plus any Apache-2.0 upstream NOTICE content that was dropped. Report which attributions are present and which are missing. This skill exposes findings only and must not be run as a release sign-off without human review. Validation signals include a clean diff between regenerated and committed attribution. Risk boundary: a missing required notice is a blocking compliance gap, not a warning to suppress.
